original_abstract: During the initial translation and content validity testing, the Polish version was well-received by patients. The challenges encountered during this process provide valuable insights, as similar issues are likely to arise in future translations and can be addressed using comparable strategies.
humanized_abstract: The first translation and content validity testing of the FCS-Polish version was given to patients for the first time. Comments made by the patients indicated that the translation was acceptable. Challenges identified during this first phase of translation appear to be universal, and solutions to these challenges can be similarly applied to subsequent translations.

Comments made by the patients indicated that the translation was acceptable. Challenges identified during this first phase of translation appear to be universal, and solutions to these challenges can be similarly applied to subsequent translations.
